title: Bromination
description: SkyBlock mod for fabric 1.21.5 with better guild bridge message display and more quality of life features.
body:
Bromination is a client-side mod adding useful features for playing on the Hypixel server. 
Current features include:
- Collapse duplicate chat messages
- Copy chat messages by CTRL-clicking them
- Allow unlimited chat messages
- Keep chat messages when reconnecting/changing server
- Formatting Hypixel guild - discord bridge messages, making them more easily readable and less cluttered.
![Message before and after conversion by Bromination](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12822af85aba7f9f5ea0c011f96a6cb86f18e15b.webp)
Supported formats are **User: message** and **User > message**

Configure bridge bot names in the config.

More features improving quality of life are planned to be added in the future.
